data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Global Real Estate Practice starts 2026 optimistically after a successful 2025 with high deal flow.
data.description: In January 22, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP's Global Real Estate Practice continues its success from 2025 with robust deal flow in 2026. The firm is experiencing high investor interest and benefiting from solid market fundamentals. Noteworthy projects include a new data center campus in rural Louisiana, indicating a positive trend for the firm.

data.title: Northview Residential REIT declares January dividend payout to investors. #RealEstate #Investing #JanuaryDividend
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the COVID-19 pandemic has led to over 10 million confirmed cases globally. The death toll has surpassed 500,000, with the United States alone reporting over 2.5 million cases and over 125,000 deaths. Several countries are experiencing a resurgence of cases as they ease lockdown restrictions, prompting concerns about a second wave. Scientists continue to work on developing a vaccine, with hopes of mass production and distribution in the near future. Businesses and governments are implementing measures to mitigate the economic impact of the pandemic, with unemployment rates soaring in many parts of the world. The situation remains fluid and unpredictable, with authorities urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Southwest Bancshares, Inc. shareholders approve acquisition by Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. in Jan 2026.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: PB) based in Houston, and Southwest Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Texas Partners Bank in San Antonio, announced a significant merger. Prosperity, the parent company of Prosperity Bank, acquired Southwest, enhancing its presence in Texas's financial sector. This strategic move solidifies Prosperity's position as a major player in the market. The merger's financial details include an exchange where Southwest shareholders will receive $75.00 in cash and 0.6 shares of Prosperity common stock for each Southwest share they own. This transaction, valued at approximately $900 million, marks a pivotal moment for both institutions.

data.title: Alaska Air Group posts Q4 earnings: $0.18 EPS, $0.43 adjusted EPS, $1.2 billion operating cash flow in 2025.
data.description: Hawaiian Airlines and Alaska Airlines have successfully obtained a single operating certificate. The earnings per share for the recent period were $0.18, while the adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.43, surpassing both expectations and the previous guidance range. The companies managed to generate $1.2 billion in operating cash flow throughout the entire year.

data.title: Stock market rebound continues, Dow Jones futures fall. Tesla rallies on self-driving news, while Intel dives.
data.description: The stock market continued its upward trend with a notable increase in the Greenland bounce. Tesla experienced a surge in stock value due to a significant announcement regarding self-driving robotaxis. However, Intel faced a late decline. Dow Jones futures dropped following the extension of the rebound in stocks.Overall, the stock market displayed positive movement with key players like Tesla making noteworthy gains. Intel, on the other hand, experienced a late decline impacting the market trends.

data.title: Allegiant's December 2025 traffic: 1,616,339 passengers, up 4.6% from December 2024.LAS VEGAS, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company announced its preliminary passenger traffic results for December 2025, revealing a year-over-year increase in scheduled service. In December 2025, the company served 1,616,339 passengers compared to 1,544,874 in December 2024, marking a 4.6% growth. This data underscores Allegiant's continued growth and demand for its services during the specified period.

data.title: Insurance giants shift blame for rising health costs to hospitals, pharmaceuticals. Lawmakers criticize execs for not controlling consumer medical expenses.
data.description: Lawmakers criticized top company executives at two congressional hearings for not doing enough to control the rising cost of medical care for consumers.

data.title: 16.7K Bitcoin inflow to exchanges sparks concerns of deepening sell-off despite price rally to $90K; traders see discounted pricing.
data.description: Despite Bitcoin's price surging to $90,000, it was unable to sustain the increase as 16,653 BTC were transferred to exchanges. However, the spot market is showing signs of improvement, indicating that traders may consider the current BTC price to be discounted.
